question: Which word completes the bottom menu text sequence 'PRODUCTS | TRAINING | ...' visible during the transition in chunk 2? A. WORST B. GIANT C. HOW-TO D. INLINE400

What is the primary color of the polo shirt worn by the presenter? A. Blue B. Green C. Black D. Grey
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing glasses and a black polo shirt stands between water system equipment. He holds various objects including a brass foot valve and a glass of brown liquid. Behind him, a green pump assembly sits atop a blue pressure tank labeled WELL-TROL. A black vertical filter housing labeled INLINE400 stands to his right. Text overlays identify the segment as Foot Valves Explained with Chris Worst.

What action is the man with glasses performing with the small object in his right hand?
Describe the sequence of visual elements and objects held by the presenter from the start of the video until the end.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the R.C. Worst Co. logo fades into view with lens flares; at 2s, menu text PRODUCTS and TRAINING appears on screen; at 4s, a man in a black polo shirt appears holding a cylindrical object; at 14s, the presenter starts holding a brass foot valve; at 18s, he switches to holding a glass containing brown liquid.

canonical_answer: He places the filter cartridge onto a surface near the green pump model.
